issues.description: Trigger should be 'StartOfTurn' not 'Activated'. This is a passive ability that activates at the start of your turn.
Condition is missing. Should check 'HasCardOnBoard' (self) AND hand size >= 5. Current condition 'Always' is insufficient.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states '[Your Turn]' which means the effect lasts for your turn, not just until end of turn.
